name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: At 399 E Main St, Apopka, FL 32703, you can reach Cash America Pawn at +1 407-886-6969.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn operates under FirstCash Holdings, Inc., the leading international operator of pawn stores, headquartered at 1600 West 7th Street, Fort Worth, Texas. FirstCash is publicly traded and listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index. The company employs approximately 22,000 people across its U.S., Latin American, and United Kingdom operations, spanning more than 3,300 retail pawn locations in 29 U.S. states and the District of Columbia, as well as Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador.

Cash America Pawn locations offer small, non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property. Customers bring in items — jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, or musical instruments — receive an immediate cash loan based on the item's assessed value, and have the option to repay and reclaim the item or forfeit it with no further obligation. Stores also buy and sell merchandise outright, purchase gold and precious metals for immediate cash payment, and offer a layaway plan requiring only 10% down for retail purchases. Through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, FirstCash also provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions via a network of over 15,000 active retail merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash's scale is its most distinctive feature — over 2,500 stores across North and Latin America with a dedicated store locator tool, making physical access straightforward for most U.S. consumers. The non-recourse structure of pawn loans is a meaningful distinction from other short-term credit products: if a borrower cannot repay, the lender keeps the collateral but cannot pursue the borrower for the balance, file a collections action, or report the default to credit bureaus. This makes pawn loans functionally invisible to a borrower's credit profile, for better or worse.

Cash America Pawn serves a specific consumer: someone with poor or no credit, an urgent cash need, and a physical asset of value. For that consumer, pawn is a legitimate option. However, the costs are significant — loan amounts are typically set at a fraction of an item's resale value, and fee structures on pawn loans translate to very high effective APRs. Consumers who can qualify for a payday alternative loan through a credit union, or a personal loan through an online lender, will almost always pay less. The risk of permanently losing an item — including items with sentimental value — if repayment is not made on time is real and should not be underestimated before pawning.
pros: No credit check required — loans are based entirely on the value of the collateral item
Non-recourse pawn loans: defaulting means forfeiting the item only, with no debt collection or credit bureau impact
3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America — among the largest pawn networks in the world
Buys and sells a wide range of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Same-day cash — immediate payment when you bring in an eligible item
Layaway plan available with just 10% down, allowing budget-friendly purchases over time
AFF subsidiary offers lease-to-own and retail finance options through 15,000+ merchant partner locations
cons: Loan amounts are set well below market value — customers typically receive 25–60% of an item's resale worth
Pawn loan fees and interest rates are very high when expressed as annual percentage rate (APR)
Risk of permanently losing valuable or sentimental items if the loan cannot be repaid on time
No online application — customers must visit a physical store and bring the collateral item in person
AFF lease-to-own products can carry high total costs compared to traditional installment loans or credit cards
best_for: Credit-challenged or unbanked consumers who own items of value and need immediate cash without a credit check
People facing a short-term cash emergency who cannot qualify for a bank or credit union loan
Bargain shoppers looking for discounted electronics, jewelry, tools, or musical instruments
Consumers who want to sell gold, silver, or jewelry quickly for a lump-sum cash payment
diagnosis: Cash America Pawn is best for consumers with no credit access who own a physical asset of value and need same-day cash with zero credit impact, as well as budget shoppers hunting discounted merchandise. The main caveat is cost: pawn loan values are deeply discounted from market value and the implied APR is high, so anyone who can qualify for a credit union PAL or online personal loan should exhaust those options first.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Tools and appliances buying and selling
Layaway plan with 10% down on retail purchases
Lease-to-own payment solutions via AFF subsidiary
Retail finance point-of-sale payment solutions (15,000+ merchant partners)
Store locator for 2,500+ North and Latin American locations
